name: Voxel Sync Lab
features: live Neural Synth entity dot matrix
lock_rule: No independent tiles. Macro tile, cube matrix cell, micro room viewport, mesh entities, and neural dot cluster share one canonical ID.
package_role: Proto-Synth Grid Engine synchronized voxel / micro-room public demo package
micro_tile_room_role: Each voxel tile acts as an ARC-Room-style tactical mesh object intake lab with synced Stonewalker entities and Neural Synth dots.
authority_doctrine: No independent tiles. tile_id, room_id, cube_id, neural_id, entity set, and border gates share one canonical ID spine.
